snippet.textDisplay:
I just bought the XGIMI Play 6. It looks identical, but it doesn't have the western streaming apps (I'm currently living in china haha).
The best part is that it was $240 USD instead of $800 price tag. 

We can still watch all our western streaming apps with our devices so it's such an amazing product!!!

snippet.textDisplay: I’m really intrigued by projectors. As someone who has moved a lot, something like this instead of a tv seems more practical, specially since I honestly pirate most of the content I consume outside of YouTube, so a normal tv is not something I really care about. But projectors are still quite practice and come with limitations on image quality so oh well, I’m not ready to commit into buying one yet
snippet.textOriginal: I’m really intrigued by projectors. As someone who has moved a lot, something like this instead of a tv seems more practical, specially since I honestly pirate most of the content I consume outside of YouTube, so a normal tv is not something I really care about. But projectors are still quite practice and come with limitations on image quality so oh well, I’m not ready to commit into buying one yet
